summary.about: The economic and regional consequences of removing oil, gas and electricity subsidies in Russia.
summary.audience: Russian energy, finance, social-protection and regional policymakers.
summary.method: Uses a regionally disaggregated Russian CGE model, including opportunity costs and fuel-substitution responses.
summary.insights: Subsidy reform must be paired with competitiveness, efficiency, governance and social-protection measures to manage uneven impacts.
